titleStmt.title: SII 24.428: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 428. (A.R. No. 123 of 1937-38.) PILLAR IN THE ACHYUTARĀYA-MAṆḌAPA

summary.p: States that as the four-pillared maṇḍapa was found insufficient to accommodate the deity on the 7th day festival called the Ellaikkarai-tirunāḷ, Śaṅkarasa, son of Avasaram, Mallarasayyaṉ, enlarged it into a sixteen-pillared maṇḍapa and provided for offerings to the god as the gift of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. A few implements of the Rathakāras such as a pair of pincers, a hammer, a chisel, etc., are also carved on one of the faces of the pillar. The Śaka year 1459 quoted in the record corresponded with Heviḷambi and in this year Āṉi 25 corresponded with June 22, 1537 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 9
Itaṉ mel
cellāniṉṟa viḷam
pi varuṣam Āṉi mātam 2 10 5 tiyati
teṉkarai pāṇḍiya
kulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu
viḻāvaṟāvati vaḷanā
ṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉ ti
ruppati perumāḷ śrī
raṅganātha devar varu
ṣa Utsavam tirukko
ṭi Āḻvār Eṟiṉa Eḻā
m tirunāḷ Ellaikka
rait tirunāḷukku pūrvam
nālukāl maṇṭapam Ā
y perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi
Amutu ceytaruḷa Iṭam
porāmal Irukkaiyil
Avasaram mallā cayyaṉ
makaṉ caṅkaracar sāmi
Accutadeva mahārāyar
Upaiyam Āka patiṉāṟu
kāl maṇṭapam Āka
kaṭṭu viccu perumāḷ
śrī raṅganāthadevar varu
ṣam varuṣam toṟum
tirunāḷ tirunāḷ to
ṟum Eḻuntaruḷi Intama
ṇṭapattile Amutu
ceytaruḷa kaṭṭaḷai
Iṭṭa pori Amutu 5 100
Atirasam 2 100 vaṭai 2 100
cukiyaṉ 2 100 Iḷanir 3 100
karumpu 5 100 pānaka kūṉ [10]
paḻam Amutu teṅkāya
mutu Intavakaippaṭi Uṇ
ṭāṉatu varuṣam toṟum
Ellaikkarait tirunāḷu
kku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ce
ytaruḷa kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi
Āle Ācandrārkkamāka
naṭatta kaṭavatākavum
svadattādviguṇam
puṇyam paradattā
nupālanam . para
dattāpa hāre
ṇa svadattam ni(ṣa)ṣcha
lam bhavet . Intatta
ṟmattukku yātām O
ruvaṉ vaṉta Atikā
riyaṉ Akitam paṇṇi
ṉate Uṇṭāṉāl
keṅkai karaiyi
le taṉ mātāpitā
vaik koṉṟa pā
vattile pokak
kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum
Inta śilāśāsa
nam Eḻutiṉamaikku
kovilkkaṇakku
śrīraṅganārāyaṇa
priyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.428 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
